subject: feat(cors): replace wildcard with dynamic origin allowlist
body:
Created lib/cors.ts with an allowlist of approved frontend origins
(devmade-ai.github.io, four-ems.vercel.app). Each handler calls cors()
which checks the request Origin against the allowlist and sets
Access-Control-Allow-Origin to the matched origin with Vary: Origin.
Unrecognized origins get no CORS header — the browser blocks the request.

Removed Access-Control-Allow-Origin from vercel.json (other CORS headers
remain static). Updated all 11 API handlers to use cors() instead of
inline OPTIONS checks.

Tags: cors, security, api, config
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
